tasks.title: Design Configuration Data Models in src/features/configuration/models.ts
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interfaces and types for user configuration including AI provider settings, AI tutor modes, study preferences, privacy settings, and two-level settings (basic and advanced). Define enums and types for AI providers, tutor personalities, and configuration options as per the specification.
acceptanceCriteria: All configuration options are represented as TypeScript types/interfaces
Two-level settings structure (basic and advanced) is clearly defined
AI provider and tutor mode enums include all specified options
tasks.expectedResult: TypeScript models file with complete configuration data structures exists and passes type checks and tests

outputPlan.description: TypeScript interfaces and enums defining the deep configuration system data models

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the foundational data structures for the deep configuration system

tasks.title: Implement Configuration State Management in src/features/configuration/configSlice.ts
tasks.description: Create a Redux slice or equivalent state management module to hold user configuration state, including actions and reducers for updating basic and advanced settings. Initialize with default values and support loading/saving from persistent storage.
acceptanceCriteria: State slice manages all configuration options
Actions exist to update individual settings and reset to defaults
Initial state matches default configuration values
tasks.expectedResult: Configuration state management module exists and passes tests

outputPlan.description: Redux slice managing user configuration state with actions and reducers

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Manages configuration state enabling user customization persistence and updates

tasks.title: Create Basic Settings UI Component in src/features/configuration/components/BasicSettingsForm.tsx
tasks.description: Implement a React form component for basic user settings including target IELTS band, exam date, AI response language, AI tutor personality, and daily study time. Use controlled inputs and connect to configuration state management. Include validation and user-friendly UI controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Form inputs correspond exactly to basic settings fields
Form updates configuration state on change
Form validates inputs and shows errors
UI is accessible and responsive
tasks.expectedResult: BasicSettingsForm component exists, connected to state, and passes UI and unit tests

outputPlan.description: React component for basic user configuration settings form

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides UI for normal users to configure essential settings

tasks.title: Create Advanced Settings UI Component in src/features/configuration/components/AdvancedSettingsForm.tsx
tasks.description: Implement a React form component for advanced user settings including AI provider selection, custom API key, model selection, prompt behavior, generation quality, cost control, automation level, and privacy settings. Connect to configuration state management and support validation and user guidance.
acceptanceCriteria: All advanced settings fields are present and editable
Form updates configuration state correctly
Sensitive fields like API keys are handled securely
UI is accessible, responsive, and user-friendly
tasks.expectedResult: AdvancedSettingsForm component exists, connected to state, and passes UI and unit tests

outputPlan.description: React component for advanced user configuration settings form

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables power users to deeply customize AI and study behavior

tasks.title: Integrate Configuration UI into Settings Page in src/features/settings/SettingsPage.tsx
tasks.description: Modify the existing SettingsPage component to include tabs or sections for BasicSettingsForm and AdvancedSettingsForm. Ensure proper navigation, state synchronization, and responsive layout. Provide toggles or links to switch between basic and advanced settings views.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page displays both basic and advanced settings sections
User can switch between basic and advanced settings easily
Changes in forms update the global configuration state
UI layout is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: SettingsPage component includes integrated configuration forms and passes tests

outputPlan.description: Add BasicSettingsForm and AdvancedSettingsForm components with navigation and layout

metadata.inputContext: Basic and Advanced Settings UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides user access point to configure IELTS Journey deeply

tasks.title: Implement Persistent Storage for User Configuration in src/features/configuration/storage.ts
tasks.description: Create utility functions to save and load user configuration to persistent storage (e.g., localStorage or IndexedDB). Integrate with configuration state management to load on app start and save on changes. Ensure data integrity and handle migration if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Configuration loads from persistent storage on app start
Configuration saves automatically on changes
Data integrity is maintained with validation
Migration strategy is defined for future changes
tasks.expectedResult: Persistent storage utilities exist and configuration state persists across sessions

outputPlan.description: Utility functions for saving and loading user configuration persistently

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures user configuration is saved and restored reliably

tasks.title: Extend AI Tutor Service to Use User Configuration in packages/ai-tutor/src/aiTutorService.ts
tasks.description: Modify AI Tutor service logic to read user configuration for AI provider, model, personality, correction strictness, feedback depth, and automation level. Implement logic to select AI provider and fallback as per user settings. Ensure AI requests use configured API keys, prompts, and parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: AI Tutor uses user-selected AI provider and model
API keys and prompts are applied from configuration
Tutor personality and correction strictness affect AI behavior
Fallback provider logic works as specified
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor service respects user configuration and behaves accordingly

outputPlan.description: Integrate user configuration into AI Tutor service logic for provider selection and behavior

metadata.inputContext: User configuration state and persistent storage
evidence: AI Tutor behavior changes with configuration
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Makes AI Tutor behavior fully customizable by user configuration

tasks.title: Add Unit and Integration Tests for Configuration System in tests/configuration/
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for configuration data models, state management, storage utilities, and UI components. Add integration tests to verify configuration persistence and AI Tutor integration. Cover edge cases and validation errors.
acceptanceCriteria: All configuration modules have unit tests with >80% coverage
Integration tests verify end-to-end configuration usage
Tests cover validation, error handling, and edge cases
tasks.expectedResult: Test suite covers configuration system and passes with high coverage

outputPlan.description: Unit tests for configuration data models
Unit tests for configuration state management
Unit tests for configuration persistent storage
Integration tests for configuration persistence and AI Tutor usage

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures quality and reliability of the deep configuration system

tasks.title: Perform Accessibility and UX Review of Configuration UI Components
tasks.description: Conduct an accessibility audit and UX review of BasicSettingsForm and AdvancedSettingsForm components. Ensure keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, color contrast, and responsive layout. Document any issues and propose fixes.
acceptanceCriteria: All form controls are accessible via keyboard
Screen readers announce labels and errors correctly
Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
UI is responsive on mobile and desktop
tasks.expectedResult: Accessibility and UX issues identified and documented with proposed fixes

outputPlan.description: Accessibility and UX review report for configuration UI components

metadata.inputContext: Basic and Advanced Settings UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves usability and accessibility of the configuration system

tasks.title: Document Deep Configuration System in docs/deep-configuration-system.md
tasks.description: Write detailed documentation describing the deep configuration system, including data models, UI components, user workflow for basic and advanced settings, AI Tutor integration, and privacy considerations. Include examples and screenshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation covers all major aspects of the configuration system
Includes usage examples and screenshots
Written clearly for developers and advanced users
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive documentation file exists and is clear and complete

outputPlan.description: Documentation for the deep configuration system feature

metadata.inputContext: All configuration implementation tasks and AI Tutor integration
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides clear guidance and reference for users and developers
